calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:52am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Golden Gate Tow appears through Mr. Aure. Respondent Patsy Ann Reese appears in pro per with Gail Powell. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions by Judge Myles.

EXHR (A) Letter from DaVita
EXHA (1) 15 pages of photocopies of photos of vehicle
EXHR (B) 4 page document from Carfax
12:11pm

Exhibits retained, matter taken under submission
